label: Prismhold Reliquary
description: Prismhold Reliquary serves as a sealed storage chamber set between the vitreous ribs off the Filament Gallery, its entry collar glazed and tarred against Kharion Prismworld’s abrasive shear fronts. Prismatic wall bins divide goods into narrow, numbered facets that catch the Gallery’s disciplined light-bands and render inventories legible at a distance. A dark crystalline floor, scored with rectilinear bearing grids, anchors a low rack of glass-lidded wells designed to prevent drift and fracture during angular tacks. Overhead, open filament conduits pass through the room in rigid channels, their measured harmonics damped by resin baffles to protect fragile stores.
